description: Book, view, and manage your Jane (janeapp.com) appointments across every clinic from one terminal — with a unified agenda, next-opening finder, and availability watch the patient portal can't do.
auth_description:
Jane has no public patient API. Each clinic is a separate subdomain with its
own patient account. Add a profile for a clinic and log in with your patient
username/email and password:

  janeapp-pp-cli profile add embophysio --url https://embophysio.janeapp.com
  janeapp-pp-cli auth login --profile embophysio

The CLI performs Jane's two-step sign-in and stores the session cookie for
that profile. Repeat for each clinic. `--all-profiles` fans read commands
across every logged-in clinic.

novel_features.name: Unified cross-clinic agenda
novel_features.description: See every appointment across every Jane clinic you use in one chronological view.

novel_features.name: Next-opening finder
novel_features.description: Find the soonest available slot for a practitioner + treatment, paging past Jane's 7-day availability cap.

novel_features.name: Availability watch
novel_features.description: Poll availability and alert when an earlier slot than a target opens up.

novel_features.name: Cross-clinic conflict check
novel_features.description: Before booking, warn if a candidate slot collides with an existing appointment at another clinic.
